messages.noPermission: &cYou do not have permission to use this command!
messages.crateSet: &aYou have turned this block into a crate: &6%crate%
messages.crateUnsetBreak: &cYou broke the crate block for &6%crate%&c; it is now removed!
messages.invalidKeyItem: &cYou are not holding the correct key item for crate &6%crate%!
messages.noKeyInHand: &cYou must hold a crate key in your hand to open this crate!
messages.inventoryFull: &cYour inventory is full, cannot receive the crate rewards!
messages.notEnoughKeys: &cYou do not have enough keys to open crate &6%crate%!
messages.inUse: &cSomeone else is already using this crate!
messages.alreadyOpening: &cYou are already opening this crate. Please wait!
messages.inventoryFullStored: &cInventory full! The prize has been saved in your storage. Use /crate storage to claim it later.
messages.virtualKeyCleared: &aCleared all virtual keys for crate &6%crate% &afrom player &6%player%!
messages.virtualKeyClearedMany: &aCleared all virtual keys for crate &6%crate% &afrom &6%count% players&a!
messages.crateInvalidAnimation: &cThat crate does not support remote open!
messages.notEnoughMoney: &cYou don't have enough %currency% to open &6%crate%&c! Price: &e%price%
messages.mustHoldCostItem: &cYou must hold &6%item% &cin your main hand to open &6%crate%&c!
